creator: hardy.schumacher@globalfoundries.com
text:
Update for irrlicht engine to v1.5.1 is still available. 
It contains several bugfixes.

Fix: 

Makefile:
---PORTVERSION=    1.5
+++PORTVERSION=    1.5.1
---PORTREVISION=  1

SIZE (irrlicht-1.5.1.zip) = 22514017

pkg-descr:
---WWW: http://irrlicht.sf.net/
+++WWW: http://irrlicht.sourceforge.net/
How-To-Repeat: n/a
